programmes.show_description: Tense thriller with Emily Rose. Realtor Lauren is elated when she lands a cash buyer for an expensive mansion. But when the owners are found murdered, is this sweet deal part of a deadly plan (2011)?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
A man begins a passionate affair with his wife's long-lost twin sister. Starring Sonya Walger. (2014)
A Snitch In Time: An informant insists that he will only talk to Sue after he is trapped in a sting operation led by Jack and Bobby.

...Evidence: Murder mystery with singer Jewel. A home renovation expert uncovers more than dry rot when the bones of a long-missing girl are found in her current project. (2017)

...Evidence: Murder mystery with singer Jewel. A home renovation expert uncovers more than dry rot when the bones of a long-missing girl are found in her current project. (2017)
Up In Flames: An explosion at a crime scene threatens to destroy all the evidence.
Bad Santa: When a young doctor is gunned down at Christmas, it's revealed that the victim's medical school fees were paid by a mob boss who also happens to be an old friend of Castle's.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. A crime fiction professor gets a taste of the real thing when a priceless lab specimen vanishes - and she's drawn into a case full of twists. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. A crime fiction professor gets a taste of the real thing when a priceless lab specimen vanishes - and she's drawn into a case full of twists. (2019)
Murder Can Be Murder: Dr Sloan and Steve investigate after Jesse raises his concerns about the suspicious death of a patient at Community General Hospital.
An Explosive Murder: The team are placed in danger when a rookie cop goes undercover to infiltrate a terrorist organisation suspected of being responsible for a series of bombings.
Fatal Paradise: Jessica travels to the idyllic Caribbean island of Martinique for a holiday. Can she help Chicago P.I, Charlie Garret, prove his innocence when he is accused of murder?
Crimson Harvest: Jessica visits Wine Country to attend the funeral of her friend's son, the heir to a struggling vineyard. Can she determine whether the murders of two men are linked?
The Signing: Can Sue convince a car thief to help her catch his dangerous accomplice, a suspected armed robber? Meanwhile, the team await the arrival of their new supervisor.
Castle, P.I.: Barred from working with Beckett, Castle turns private eye to work 'independently' on the same case as the 12th precinct.
With Honor: A murder investigation unearths evidence that suggests Al's former partner may have been a dirty cop. Can Carrie help to protect Al who now finds himself in danger?
...Dead Over Heels: Murder hits close to home for librarian and crime buff Aurora when she gets involved in the death of a local detective. (2017)

FMurder: Dr Sloan investigates the murder of a controversial radio shock-jock, killed by electrocution. Will he be able to prove that his initial suspicions are correct?
